<style>
  :root {
    --bg-primary: #0d1117;
    --bg-secondary: #161b22;
    --bg-tertiary: #1c2333;
    --text-primary: #e6edf3;
    --text-secondary: #8b949e;
    --text-muted: #6e7681;
    --accent: #58a6ff;
    --accent-dim: #1f6feb;
    --border: #30363d;
    --highlight: #ffd700;
    --danger: #f85149;
    --success: #3fb950;
    --sidebar-width: 300px;
    --header-height: 60px;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg-primary);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════
     HEADER
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .header {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    height: var(--header-height);
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0 20px;
    z-index: 1000;
  }

  .hamburger {
    display: none;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    font-size: 24px;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 5px 10px;
    margin-right: 15px;
  }

  .header-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent);
    letter-spacing: 3px;
  }

  .header-subtitle {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-left: 15px;
  }

  .header-chain {
    margin-left: auto;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-family: monospace;
  }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════
     SIDEBAR NAVIGATION
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .sidebar {
    position: fixed;
    top: var(--header-height);
    left: 0;
    width: var(--sidebar-width);
    height: calc(100vh - var(--header-height));
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 20px 0;
    z-index: 999;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }

  .sidebar-overlay {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    z-index: 998;
  }

  .nav-section {
    padding: 8px 20px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-top: 15px;
  }

  .nav-section:first-child { margin-top: 0; }

  .nav-link {
    display: block;
    padding: 6px 20px 6px 30px;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 13px;
    border-left: 3px solid transparent;
    transition: all 0.15s ease;
  }

  .nav-link:hover {
    color: var(--text-primary);
    background: var(--bg-tertiary);
    border-left-color: var(--accent);
  }

  .nav-link.active {
    color: var(--accent);
    border-left-color: var(--accent);
    background: var(--bg-tertiary);
  }

  .nav-link.nav-sub {
    padding-left: 45px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
  }

  .nav-importance {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin-right: 6px;
  }

  .nav-importance.critical { background: var(--danger); }
  .nav-importance.high { background: var(--highlight); }
  .nav-importance.medium { background: var(--success); }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════
     MAIN CONTENT
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ */
  .main {
    margin-left: var(--sidebar-width);
    margin-top: var(--header-height);
    padding: 40px 60px;
    max-width: 900px;
  }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════
     CONTENT STYLES
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ */
  h1 {
    font-size: 32px;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin: 50px 0 20px 0;
    padding-bottom: 10px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--accent-dim);
  }

  h2 {
    font-size: 22px;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    margin: 35px 0 15px 0;
    padding-bottom: 5px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  h3 {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: var(--accent);
    margin: 25px 0 10px 0;
  }

  p { margin: 12px 0; color: var(--text-secondary); }

  /* Keynote / callout boxes */
  .keynote {
    background: var(--bg-tertiary);
    border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
    padding: 15px 20px;
    margin: 20px 0;
    border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0;
  }

  .keynote-title {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .keynote p { margin: 5px 0; font-size: 14px; }

  .critical-insight {
    background: rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.1);
    border-left-color: var(--danger);
  }

  .critical-insight .keynote-title { color: var(--danger); }

  .highlight-box {
    background: rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.08);
    border-left-color: var(--highlight);
  }

  .highlight-box .keynote-title { color: var(--highlight); }

  /* Code blocks */
  pre {
    background: var(--bg-tertiary);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 15px;
    overflow-x: auto;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    margin: 15px 0;
  }

  code {
    font-family: 'Cascadia Code', 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace;
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  /* Inline code */
  p code, li code {
    background: var(--bg-tertiary);
    padding: 2px 6px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 12px;
  }

  /* Collapsible sections */
  details {
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px;
    margin: 15px 0;
  }

  summary {
    padding: 12px 18px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--accent);
    user-select: none;
  }

  summary:hover { background: var(--bg-tertiary); }

  details[open] summary {
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }

  details .content {
    padding: 15px 18px;
  }

  /* Tables */
  table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    margin: 15px 0;
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  th {
    background: var(--bg-tertiary);
    color: var(--accent);
    padding: 10px 12px;
    text-align: left;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border);
    font-size: 12px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }

  td {
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
  }

  tr:hover td { background: var(--bg-tertiary); }

  /* Acknowledgement section */
  .acknowledgement {
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 25px 30px;
    margin: 30px 0;
  }

  .acknowledgement h3 { color: var(--highlight); margin-top: 0; }

  .acknowledgement a {
    color: var(--accent);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .acknowledgement a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

  .acknowledgement .credit-role {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
  }

  /* Charlie Day section */
  .charlie-day {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, 
      rgba(248,81,73,0.05), 
      rgba(255,215,0,0.05), 
      rgba(88,166,255,0.05));
    border: 1px dashed var(--highlight);
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 25px;
    margin: 20px 0;
  }

  .charlie-day h2 {
    color: var(--highlight);
    border-bottom-color: var(--highlight);
  }

  /* LLM Tips section */
  .llm-tip {
    background: var(--bg-tertiary);
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 12px 18px;
    margin: 10px 0;
    border-left: 3px solid var(--success);
  }

  .llm-tip strong { color: var(--success); }

  /* Chain metadata footer */
  .chain-meta {
    background: var(--bg-secondary);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px;
    padding: 15px 20px;
    margin-top: 60px;
    font-family: monospace;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text-muted);
  }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════════
     RESPONSIVE — MOBILE
     ══════════════════════════════════════════ */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .hamburger { display: block; }

    .sidebar {
      transform: translateX(-100%);
    }

    .sidebar.open {
      transform: translateX(0);
    }

    .sidebar-overlay.open {
      display: block;
    }

    .main {
      margin-left: 0;
      padding: 30px 20px;
    }

    .header-subtitle { display: none; }
  }
</style>
